violations.text: Allergen statement is missing on menus and/or point of sale. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
Inspector observed the auto-dispenser for the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink to be empty. Per PIC, service technician has not come to refill unit. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

Cut fruit and yogurt parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
Allergen Advisory statement not present at order point or menu. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The handwashing sink in the front service area and back kitchen are lacking proper handwashing signs. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
